violations.text: The condensate from the walk in freezer refrigeration unit was observed freezing to walls and floors. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2025
Sliced chicken deli meat was observed held past the 7 day date marking. Item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, walk in cooler fans, and freezer floor have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
